commit.message:
Performance: zombie reap, _tw cache, binary truncation, 20fps idle

- SIGCHLD=SIG_IGN auto-reaps daemon child processes (no more zombies)
- _tw() results cached class-wide — font metric calls cut ~10x per frame
- _fit() uses binary search truncation — O(log n) vs O(n) per row
- Idle sleep 0.016/0.033 → 0.05 (20fps) reduces GUI CPU ~60%
- Input handling path unchanged — button response still immediate

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
perf(vote): progressive image preloading + compress overlays

Split monolithic preloadImages() into 3 phases:
- NameForm overlays (blocking, 928 Ko instead of 7.6 Mo)
- Avatar layers (background, on NameForm display)
- Vote images (background, on AvatarStep display)

Loading screen shown if user advances before preload completes.
Resize overlays from 1440x3200 to max 2000px + webp q80 (-74%).
Add background-color fallback to prevent white flash.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Severity を 5 段階 (critical/high/medium/low/info) に細分化する

- src/rules/types.ts: Severity 型を 'critical'|'high'|'medium'|'low'|'info' に更新
- 各ルールの severity を重大度に応じて再マッピング
  - high: HE1001/1002/1004/2001/2004/3003 (旧 error)
  - medium: HE1005/2002/3001/3002 (旧 warning のセキュリティ・運用影響系)
  - low: HE1003/1007/2003/2005/2007 (旧 warning のベストプラクティス系)
  - info: 変更なし
- formatter/tty.ts: カラーリングとサマリ表示を 5 段階対応に更新
- formatter/json.ts: summary フィールドを 5 段階対応に更新
- formatter/sarif.ts: SEVERITY_MAP を 5 段階対応に更新
- テスト: 全 severity アサーションを新しい値に更新

Closes #1

commit.message:
Fix runtime safety: null guards, error handling, shared error boundary

- Fix non-null assertion crash in dashboard (currentWorkspace!.id)
- Fix non-null assertion in settings (currentWorkspace!.name)
- Add shared error boundary at app/(app)/error.tsx
- Replace silent error catches with user-visible messages in brand, lean-canvas, mvv, TodaySchedule
- Standardize admin page to use WorkspaceGuard pattern

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix quota runtime estimates: use RPM as bottleneck, sync top probability slider

- Runtime estimate now based on RPM (Gemini 4 RPM = 240 calls/h, ~6.25h for 1500 RPD)
  not probability, which barely affects duration with 50 agents
- Remove misleading per-probability runtime table from popup
- Show RPM and single accurate runtime estimate instead
- Fix ID collision between top slider and popup slider (use class selectors)
- Sync top probability slider when switching provider via popup
- Expose RPM and max_calls_per_hour in /api/llm/quota per-provider data
- Update nn_selfimprove budget calculations to use RPM-based math

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: pass numbers and brackets through to Claude when session is focused

1-9, ], [ were being intercepted for session switching even when a session had
keyboard focus, making it impossible to type numbers or brackets in Claude Code.

These keys now pass through to Claude. Session switching while focused uses the
; leader prefix: ;1-;9, ;], ;[. The hint bar and help overlay are updated.

burndown projection with proper date ranges and plan types (COBRA, ACA,
Spouse, Other). Premiums are time-bounded expenses added to monthly burn
during each phase's active window.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: move handleUndo before its consuming useEffect in BugDropWidget

handleUndo was defined at line 318 but referenced in the keyboard-shortcut
useEffect dependency array at line 228, causing a ReferenceError that crashed
AnnotationView and failed 14 BugDropWidget tests. Moved the useCallback
definition above the useEffect that depends on it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use service role key for all Supabase reads (bypass RLS)

RLS is enabled on all Supabase tables but no SELECT policies exist for
the anon role. All read functions now use supabaseAdmin (service role key)
which bypasses RLS, ensuring data from admin updates shows on landing pages.

Tables affected: projects, home_page, about_page, what_i_offer_page,
contact_page, pages, settings, blogs

commit.message:
refactor: remove dead code, unused modules and stale TODO comments

Delete abandoned design-phase modules:
- src/worker/ (TaskManager/CompressionTask/ProgressUpdate never used)
- src/engine/registry.rs (CodecRegistry bypassed by direct create_encoder)
- src/engine/codec/jxl.rs, svg.rs (stub encoders that only bail!)
- src/engine/preprocess/color.rs, quantize.rs (empty/todo! placeholders)

Remove unused trait and types:
- Codec trait (name/formats never called after registry removal)
- EncodeParams::output_format(), OutputFormat, ResizeParams, CompressionOptions
- CompressionResult.original_size/output_format, EncodedOutput.format
- GpuAccelerator::supports_compute(), i18n::current_language()

Clean up all impl Codec blocks and unused imports across 10 codec files.
Remove stale TODO comments in WGSL shaders (implementations are complete).
Fix Slint padding warnings by moving padding to layout elements.

Result: zero warnings, zero errors on cargo build.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: 새로만들기 메뉴 개편 + NoCode 비주얼 쿼리 빌더 구현

새로만들기 메뉴
- 질문: /questions/pick (테이블/컬렉션 선택 흐름)
- SQL 쿼리: /questions/new (기존 NotebookEditor)
- 대시보드: /builder

질문 선택 흐름 (/questions/pick)
- 테이블 선택: 데이터셋 그리드 → /questions/nocode?dataset=xxx
- 컬렉션에서 선택: /collections 이동

NoCode 비주얼 쿼리 빌더 (/questions/nocode)
- 데이터 섹션: 테이블 칩 + 피커 + ▶ 실행 버튼
- 모드 토글: 원시 데이터 / 요약
- 필터 섹션: 컬럼/연산자/값 + "필터 더하기" 버튼 (Metabase 스타일)
- 요약 섹션: 집계함수(COUNT/SUM/AVG/MIN/MAX) + 메트릭 + (으)로 + 그룹화
- 정렬/행수 제한 옵션
- 시각화 버튼 → 결과 차트(막대/선/파이) + 표 전환
- 결과 저장 → 컬렉션 추가 다이얼로그 연동

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

지정 정비업체 관리 기능 완성 (관리자 입력 + 직원 동적 로딩)

- 관리자 페이지: 지정업체 등록/수정 JS 기능 추가 (toggleShopEdit, saveDesignatedShop, loadDesignatedShop)
- Firebase vehicle-designated-shop 컬렉션에 업체 정보 저장/로드
- 직원 페이지: 하드코딩된 업체 정보 제거, Firebase에서 동적 로딩으로 변경

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: admin changes now reflect immediately on landing pages

- Fix critical revalidatePath bug: home page was calling revalidatePath('/home')
  instead of revalidatePath('/') so the home page cache was never invalidated
- Change all public pages from ISR caching (60s/3600s) to revalidate=0 so
  every request fetches fresh data from Supabase immediately after admin updates
- Add revalidate=0 to blogs page which had no revalidation (was statically
  generated and never showed new blog posts)
- Add Supabase storage domain to next.config.ts remotePatterns so images
  hosted on Supabase load correctly in Next.js Image components
